books.title: The Greenhouse at the Edge of Everything
books.blurb: Wren left a life built on threat assessment and exit counts behind on Meridian Station. Thistledown, four hundred people under a dome and a thousand seedlings deep in first planting, does not run on any protocol she knows. Neither does Asa Devereux, the settlement's quiet head grower, who notices things the way she does, just gentler.

books.title: Small Repairs
books.blurb: Marlowe Kestrel fixes things and leaves. Thistledown is supposed to be one more contract: a greenhouse dome with a humidity problem, a fix she already understands, and a clean exit before anyone gets used to her. Then her fix fails publicly, and Hollis Brightwater, Thistledown's schoolteacher, is the first person who lets her be wrong without making her feel smaller for it.

books.title: Keeping it Warm
books.blurb: Linnet Ashworth has run The Long Steep, Thistledown's only coffee shop and best-loved institution, for fifteen years. What she does not need is someone arriving with plans to replace it with something faster, newer, and theoretically better. Callum Pruitt has spent twenty years being good at jobs that do not remember him, until one contract makes him question what his work is really threatening.
